calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Continued To Apr-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

A. Jeaane Grove, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 1288 HOWARD, LP.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ALL PERSONS CLAIMING ANY INTEREST IN, OR LIEN UPON,THE REAL PROPERTY HEREIN DESCRIBED OR ANY PARY THEREOF.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Anthony Chan and Benjamin Ron sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Plaintiff 1288 HOWARD, LP is adjudged the owner of the Gaps of Unknown Ownership in the Howard Property;
Plaintiff 1288 HOWARD, LP's title to the Gaps of Unknown Ownership is establiched and quieted as of the date this action was filed. Ehibits A and B Legal Description as attachment to Judgment. See scanned Judgment.
Court signed judgment in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Mar-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Continued To Dec-17-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
